task_completion.description: Set the page dimensions to a vertical ID badge format (2.13 x 3.38 inches).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The canvas in EdrawMax should be a tall, narrow rectangle (portrait orientation) resembling a standard ID card, corresponding to the custom dimensions.

task_completion.description: Add a bold header 'NEXUS DYNAMICS' and a photo placeholder in the upper center.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'NEXUS DYNAMICS' should be visible at the top of the badge in a bold font, with a shape or image placeholder positioned in the upper center below the header.

task_completion.description: Include the employee details: 'Alex Mercer', 'Systems Architect', and 'ND-8942'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'Alex Mercer', title 'Systems Architect', and ID 'ND-8942' should be clearly visible as text elements on the badge.

task_completion.description: Add a blue footer bar to the badge.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A blue rectangular shape should be placed at the bottom edge of the badge design.

task_completion.description: Include a QR code on the badge.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A QR code graphic should be visible on the badge design.

task_completion.description: Save the native file as nexus_id_badge.eddx in the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The EdrawMax window title should display 'nexus_id_badge.eddx', or a save dialog should show this filename being saved to the /home/ga/Documents directory.

task_completion.description: Export the design as a PNG image to the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog in EdrawMax, a file manager window, or a terminal verifying the existence of 'nexus_id_badge.png' in /home/ga/Documents should be visible.

integrity.description: The agent used the EdrawMax GUI to create the design.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with EdrawMax menus, toolbars, and canvas to add shapes, text, and QR codes, rather than using terminal commands to generate the file.

integrity.description: The QR code was generated using EdrawMax's built-in tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should use the application's QR code generator (e.g., via the Insert menu) and input 'ND-8942', rather than downloading and pasting an external image.

integrity.description: The PNG file was created using the application's export function.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should use EdrawMax's Export feature (File > Export & Send > Graphics), not take a system screenshot and rename it.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The badge must have dimensions 2.13x3.38 inches. Required text elements are 'NEXUS DYNAMICS', 'Alex Mercer', 'Systems Architect', and 'ND-8942'. A QR code must be present (containing 'ND-8942'). The design must be saved as '/home/ga/Documents/nexus_id_badge.eddx' and exported as '/home/ga/Documents/nexus_id_badge.png'.
